posts.raw_content:
SLAVERY
Jack Griffin


There is nothing more sinister than taking a man's freedom and liberty; on that we must all agree. But the fact of the matter is; it was Caucasian people that ENDED slavery in modern times. Contemporary slavery is still alive and well all over the African, Asian and Muslim world. The first man to legally own a slave in America was black, his name was Anthony Johnson. There is no place on earth where African-Americans experience more equality, than here in America. The truth about slavery is that the overwhelming majority of Africans were sold to Caucasians by Africans themselves. When the trans-Atlantic ships pulled into port, they purchased slaves who were already slaves. Rival tribes were captured by black Africans and Arab Muslims, who then took them to the coastal slave markets to sell. White people weren't going to Africa and kidnapping free black people for slaves, they were already enslaved. Caucasians barely needed to get off their ships when they docked; the slavers were there ready to sell. 

Furthermore, Africans enslaved far more white Europeans in the Barbary slave trade. Europe was raided by African and Arab Muslims (reparation can start with their ancestors). White European Christians were being kidnapped and enslaved. The white men were made galley slaves, and the white women (you guessed it) sex slaves. It was considerably more brutal than being a domestic servant, or working on a plantation. NONE of your enslaved ancestor’s decedents ended up a millionaire with a Nike deal. America was infected by the scourge of slavery but abolished it. The vast majority of American whites never even owned slaves. African-Americans couldn't stand to be around whites after slavery was abolished. They left America and formed Liberia (which was primarily funded by abolitionists). As you may have surmised, that turned out disastrously. They have ruled there since day one, it is an abysmal hell hole. Liberals should move there to establish their multi-cultural utopia. They can be free of the evil white man.  Many white men, some fighting against their own brothers and fathers, died to free slaves. An estimated 400 to 600,000 white men made the ultimate sacrifice for African Americans, the Earth ran red with their blood.
